title: modes::Modifier::Debug and Preset::Debug share variant names creating display ambiguity
description:
## Severity
Trivial
## Dimension
naming
## Location
src/modes/mod.rs:67-104 (Modifier and Preset enums)
## Violation
Both Modifier and Preset have variants Debug, Methodical, Director. The Display impl produces the same string ('debug') for both — log lines like 'mode: debug' are ambiguous. Preset::Debug also reads confusingly close to std::fmt::Debug in match arms.
## Mandated refactor
Rename Preset::Debug to Preset::Investigate (matches existing doc-comment). Disambiguate Methodical/Director by adding context to the Preset names, OR add serde rename discriminators.
## Filed from QA review dispatch
